results.validation_notes: Previous classification incorrectly identified this as Microservices. The single Dockerfile builds a single deployable (Squidex.dll), and the solution structure (backend/Squidex.sln) compiles multiple projects into one application — this is a Modular Monolith. Pipe-and-Filter was also incorrectly attributed; no pipeline/stage processing patterns are present. CQRS and Event-Driven are confirmed by EventSourcing/Commands directories and explicit README statement. Domain-Driven Design is confirmed by bounded context structure (Domain.Apps, Domain.Users).
